titleStmt.title: Florence, Biblioteca Medicea Laurenziana, BML Acq. e doni 756
Magic scroll

sourceDesc.p: Aligned in Transkribus by Hizkiel Mitiku.

msItem.title: Prayer against Bāryā, Tǝgrǝtyā and Belsibā
msItem.note: Prayer against Bāryā, Tǝgrǝtyā and Belsibā, written mostly in Gǝʿǝz and partly in Amharic with invocations of magic names, mostly unintelligible.

msItem.title: Prayer against Bāryā and Lǝgewon
msItem.note: Prayer against Bāryā and Lǝgewon and against various diseases as colic, pleurisy, pleuralgia; with invocation of the names of the nails of the cross (sador, ʾalādar, dānāt, ʾadarā, rodās) and other magic names.
msItem.incipit: ጸሎት፡ በእንተ፡ ባርያ፡ ወልጌዎን፡ ርኩስ፡ ዘይሰልብ፡ ልበ፡ ሰብእ፡ ወይጸልም፡ አእይንት፡ ወይመጽእ፡ ከመ፡ ጽለሎት፡ ወሕልም፡

msItem.title: Prayer to Jesus Christ
msItem.note: With invocation of the names of the nails of the cross, and other magic names and probably related to Protective prayer against various illnesses, containing the names of the nails of the cross.
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ዘከተሮ፡ ለሠይጣን፡ በ፭ቅንዋተ፡ ሳዶርቋ፡

msItem.title: Prayer against Bāryā and Šatolāy
msItem.note: Prayer against Bāryā and Šatolāy for the healing of vaginal bleeding and for the protection of newborn babies through the invocation of magic names similar to Protective prayer against šatolāy, with ʾasmāt and the Christ's blood, his sharp sword similar to Sayfa malakot and through the six words of the Gospel.
msItem.incipit: ጸለት፡ በእንተ፡ አርጋኤም፡ ሶንታም፡ ቃንታም፡ አጵር፡ መጵር፡ አንተ፡ ባርያ፡ ወሸቶላይ፡ ዘታወሕዝ፡ ደመ፡ ወትቀት፡ ሕፃነ፡ ፈቲሃከ፡ ሁር፡

msItem.title: Miracle of Jesus healing the bleeding woman
msItem.note: A passage from Wangel za-Mārqos on the flow of a woman's blood.
msItem.incipit: ወንገኤል፡ ዘማርቆስ፡ ወእንዘ፡ የሐውር፡ እግዚኢነ፡ ውስተ፡ አሕጕረ፡ አድያም፡ ወመጽአት፡ ዓሐቲ፡ ብእሲት፡ እንተ፡ ደም፡ ይውሕዛ፡
msItem.explicit: ወገሰሰት፡ ጽንፈ፡ ለብሱ፡ ወሶቤሃ፡ ነጸፈ፡ ነቅአ፡ ደማ፡ ከማሃ፡ አሕይዋ፡ ለአመትከ፡ ወልተ፡ ሥላሴ፡

msItem.title: Ṣalot za-qǝddus Susǝnyos baʾǝnta ʾasassǝlo dawe
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ሕያው፡ የሐሱ፡ ለቅዱስ፡ ሱስንዮስ፡ በእንተ፡ አሰሰሎ፡ ዳዌ፡ ወሕፃናት፡
msItem.explicit: ወአንስተ፡ ወአንስተ፡ ኢሐውር፡ ውስቴቱ፡ እስከ፡ ለአለመ፡ አለም፡ አሜን፡ ኦቅዱስ፡ ሱስንዮስ፡ነ፡ ስማእተ፡ በእግዚኢነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ ሎቱ፡ ስብሃት፡ እስከ፡ ለዓለመ፡ አለም፡ አሜ፡ አድኅኖ፡ ለአመትከ፡ ወለተ፡ ስላሴ፡ ዘአኧርጋእከ። ነደለ፡ በረ

msItem.title: Prayer against Šatolāy and Šatolāwit
msItem.note: Prayer against Šatolāy and Šatolāwit for healing from vaginal bleeding and for protection of newborn babies through the invocation of magic names and through the binding of demons with the bonds of the Father, Son and Holy Spirit similar to Protective prayer against šatolāy, with ʾasmāt.
msItem.incipit: ጸሎት፡ በእንተ፡ ሸቶላይ፡ ወሸቶላዊት፡ አጋንንት፡ ዘትቀትሎ፡ ሕፃናተ፡ ወታወሕዙ፡ ደመ፡ አመሐኩክሙ፡ ወአውገዝኩከሙ፡ ወአርሰርኩክሙ፡
msItem.explicit: ደፈር፡ በሎንቃር፡ ፈውስ፡ ወአሕይዋ፡ ለአመትከ፡ ወልተ፡ ሥላሴ፡እመ፡ አልቦ፡ ነገር፡ ዘይሰአኖ፡ ለእግአብሔር፡

layout.note: 181 lines in the left column and 188 lines in the right column.

handNote.seg: incipits, sacred names, name of owner

decoNote.desc: Large miniature in black and red, depicting an angel with a sword, surrounded by a garland-shaped frame at the top.
Large black and red miniature of a cross and four angels surrounded by a frame in the centre of the scroll.
Large miniature in black, red and purple, depicting a cross with a human face in the centre, surrounded by a purple frame at the bottom part of the scroll.
Black lines frame the written text.

item.desc: "107907" with pencil on the bottom left by a recent European hand.

bibl.title: I manoscritti etiopici della Biblioteca Medicea Laurenziana di Firenze
Rassegna di Studi Etiopici

The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)
